evals.prompt: Design error handling for a checkout flow that can fail at payment, inventory, or shipping steps
assertions: designs user-facing error messages for each failure mode
error messages answer what happened, whose fault, and what to do next
implements structured logging with correlation IDs
recommends retry logic for transient errors
includes error boundary or fallback UI pattern

evals.prompt: We can't figure out why API requests are intermittently slow — no clear pattern
assertions: recommends distributed tracing to identify slow spans
suggests structured logging at service boundaries
recommends latency percentile dashboards (p50, p95, p99)
addresses alerting on latency SLO burn rate
